name: Orange Fruit Cremes
recipeInstructions: Note: Combine the orange juice and ice cubes to make 1 cup. Mix gelatin with boiling water until gelatin is dissolved. Add the orange juice and ice cube mixture. Stir until all ice cubes are dissolved, then add milk. Chill before serving. Garnish with an orange slice if desired. For a variation, replace the orange juice with strawberry puree and adjust the gelatin flavor to strawberry or cherry.
